title: Work & Privacy Policy
subtitle: Transparent and professional guidelines ensuring a smooth, secure, and successful collaboration.

policies.title: 50% Advance
policies.description: A 50% upfront payment is required to commence work and secure your project slot.

policies.title: 50% On Completion
policies.description: The remaining 50% balance is due upon project completion, prior to final deployment.

policies.title: Full Deployment Handover
policies.description: Complete deployment assistance. All credentials and source code are handed over to the client.

policies.title: 24-Hour Refund Policy
policies.description: Full refund guaranteed within 24 hours of the initial project agreement if you change your mind.

policies.title: 1 Month Free Support
policies.description: Enjoy one month of complimentary technical support and bug fixes after the launch.

policies.title: New Features & Add-ons
policies.description: Any new features requested after delivery will be billed as separate, additional charges.
